description: Phase 9 T10: 650M INT8-vs-FP32 logit quality on Apple M3 Pro (post ExpNeon NaN fix). Proxy for the PPPL/ProteinGym drift gate; the W8A8 recipe is unchanged from x86.
metric: esm-cpp-int8 vs esm-cpp-fp32 final logits, 5 random sequences len 60-200
note: Before the ExpNeon input clamp (P9 fix), 650M produced all-NaN logits via the shared attention softmax. The formal PPPL (<0.1) / ProteinGym (<0.01) gates at 150M/650M use this same recipe and remain carry-forward (tools/run_pppl_drift.py NaN bug from Phase 7 still open).
